non_blocking_issues: Issue 3 (agent/model lag): existing-session code path looks correct after 0efe5b6; the defensive fix (draft-agent persist + protect selectedAgentName) is sound but if user still sees lag on existing sessions, suspect server-side session-config precedence over per-prompt fields — clone sst/opencode to opencode-src/ to verify.

issues_reviewed.title: Tab horizontal-swipe flicker
issues_reviewed.root_cause: HorizontalPager page content has no key=; rememberLazyListState() not keyed by sessionId. Prepend-reorder only triggers for not-yet-open sessions (explorer overstated).
issues_reviewed.fix: Add key={ page -> rootSessions[page]?.id } to HorizontalPager; optionally key LazyListState by sessionId.

issues_reviewed.title: First slash-command in draft errors
issues_reviewed.root_cause: executeCommand has no draft-materialization branch (only sendMessage does).
issues_reviewed.fix: Extract materializeDraftSession() shared helper; /clear stays local.

issues_reviewed.title: agent/model switch one-message lag
issues_reviewed.root_cause: Existing-session path correct after 0efe5b6. Draft mode persists model but not agent on materialization.
issues_reviewed.fix: Defensive: persist agent in materializeDraftSession; only sync selectedAgentName when per-session agent exists.

issues_reviewed.title: Rate-limit/quota errors invisible
issues_reviewed.root_cause: SSE dispatch has no session.error/else branch; error-only assistant messages filtered out before ErrorCard.
issues_reviewed.fix: Add session.error branch + else; unfilter error-bearing messages.

issues_reviewed.title: Server switch loses model-disable config
issues_reviewed.root_cause: URL edit doesn't clear old key (orphan); configureServer doesn't emit HostProfileSwitched.
issues_reviewed.fix: by-URL storage of availability+disabled; clear on URL change/delete; manual refresh inherits disabled ∩ available.

notes: Five bugs reviewed in parallel. Issue 3 is the only one where current code (0efe5b6, in 0.4.0) appears correct on the main path; defensive fixes applied regardless. User's Issue 5 proposal approved with collision-defense (lowercase host) and clear-on-URL-edit semantics.
